message:
fix(security): prevent timing attacks and improve validation

- share-link-store: Add dummy PBKDF2 computation when no password hash
  exists to prevent timing attacks that could reveal password presence
- credentials: Add Zod validation for token refresh API response to
  prevent trusting potentially malicious server responses
- premium-packs: Add TypeScript flow hints after process.exit calls
- offline: Fix pluralization grammar (hour/hours, day/days)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
